title: Intense Smoky Mexican Tomato Churros
description: Salty, chewy, and intensely flavored, these Mexican tomato churros are a midnight craving sensation, featuring diced tomatoes and confit-tomato in a keto-friendly package, cooked to perfection in a tandoor-clay-pot.
instructions: Preheat the tandoor-clay-pot to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, granulated sweetener, smoked paprika, garlic powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together eggs and olive oil.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir until a dough forms.
Fold in diced tomatoes, confit-tomato, and mozzarella cheese.
Pipe the dough through a star tip into long, thin strips.
Fry the churros in the preheated tandoor-clay-pot for 5 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Remove the churros from the pot and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the churros hot and enjoy.
